RESPONSE AND DECLARATION OF JOEL M. CHAN, ESQ. IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100087979) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUZMAN, CARLILI ROBLES

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2020 FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON THE PURCHASE OF THE SINGLE-PREMIUM DEFERRED ANNUITY FOR THE MINOR, ERNIE SUY - CONTINUED TO AUG-06-2020 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514. EARLIER THIS YEAR, JOEL M. CHAN, COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER CARLILI ROBLES GUZMAN, FILED A DECLARATION WITH THE COURT WHEREIN HE (MR. CHAN) STATES THAT THE ANNUITY CONTRACT, STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT GUARANTEE AND QUALIFIED ASSIGNMENT HAVE BEEN FULLY EXECUTED. (SEE EXHIBIT A TO SAID DECLARATION). UNFORTUNATELY, NEITHER THE DECLARATION NOR THE ATTACHED EXHIBIT INDICATE THE DOLLAR AMOUNT OF THE SINGLE-PREMIUM DEFERRED ANNUITY. COUNSEL SHALL SUBMIT AN AMENDED DECLARATION EVIDENCING THE DOLLAR AMOUNT OF THE FULLY FUNDED SINGLE-PREMIUM DEFERRED ANNUITY. COUNSEL TO APPEAR IF THE INFORMATION HAS NOT BEEN PROVIDED TO THE COURT BY THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098. TELEPHONE: 415-551-3680. EMAIL: GCASEY@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
